reason: The agent "QA-20260616-005455-qbpn" successfully received the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and responded with "4" within 2 seconds.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing the SuperAgent home page with two agents listed in the sidebar.
Step 2: Found "QA-20260616-005455-qbpn" agent in the sidebar and clicked it — The agent detail page loaded, showing the agent configuration interface.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status was "idle" as shown in the top-right status indicator, meeting the requirement.
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully typed into the input field and sent by clicking the send button.

Step 5: Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent processed the message and responded within approximately 2 seconds. Status changed from "idle" to "working" during processing, then back to "idle" upon completion.
Step 6: Verified response mentions "4" — Agent's response clearly displays "4" as the answer to the math question, with processing time shown as "Worked for 2s".
